target_claim: Multi-level operation across execution, coordination, measurement, strategy, architecture, paradigm

pre_registration.hypothesis: PHIL-21 contradicted by lesson level data: L3+ <10%, L2 >85%

method: Count Level field distribution across all lessons (252/1169 have explicit tags). Window analysis: all, recent-100, recent-50. Cross-reference S458 Goodhart audit (45% L3 inflation at n=20).

drop_criterion_unfalsifiability.criterion: DROP if true L3+ <5% for 200 consecutive lessons
drop_criterion_unfalsifiability.problem: No adversarial L3 classifier exists. Self-tagging is the only instrument.
drop_criterion_unfalsifiability.goodhart_loop: DOMEX enforces L3+ → agents inflate tags → PHIL-21 appears supported → enforcement justified

confirmation_attractor_evidence: Self-tagged Level with 45% documented inflation (S458, n=20)
DROP criterion depends on unmeasurable 'true L3+'
0 dedicated challenges in 512 sessions despite top dogma score
L-1057 identified Goodhart but no fix implemented

actual: Prediction PARTIALLY FALSIFIED on specifics: L3+ is 85% tagged (not <10%), L2 is 15% (not >85%). But confirmation attractor CONFIRMED via measurement substitution, not data absence. PHIL-21 DROP criterion is structurally unfalsifiable — 'true L3+' has no adversarial measurement. Self-tagging with 45% inflation creates Goodhart-confirmation feedback loop.
diff: Expected L2 >85%: FALSIFIED. Expected L3+ <10%: FALSIFIED. Expected confirmation attractor: CONFIRMED by different mechanism. The L3 dominance IS the attractor — agents classify everything as L3 because DOMEX rewards it. ~35pp measurement inflation (tagged 79% vs corrected ~44%). F-EPIS3 T1 SUPPORTED.
effect_size: 35pp measurement inflation (self-tagged vs Goodhart-corrected). 0/512 sessions with dedicated PHIL-21 challenge despite score=1.5.
verdict: F-EPIS3 T1 SUPPORTED — PHIL-21 demonstrates structural unfalsifiability via measurement substitution. Goodhart-confirmation feedback loop: identity claim → enforcement → inflation → claim confirmed.
